task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Operations Daily Sync' event is rescheduled to start at 09:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the calendar view or event details, the 'Operations Daily Sync' event block is aligned with the 09:00 AM time slot.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Operations Daily Sync' event maintains its original date and duration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: By comparing final screenshots with earlier ones, the 'Operations Daily Sync' event remains on the same day column and its block height (duration) is unchanged.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Sales Pipeline Sync' event is rescheduled to start at 09:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the calendar view or event details, the 'Sales Pipeline Sync' event block is aligned with the 09:00 AM time slot.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Sales Pipeline Sync' event maintains its original date and duration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: By comparing final screenshots with earlier ones, the 'Sales Pipeline Sync' event remains on the same day column and its block height (duration) is unchanged.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Weekly Team Kickoff' event is not modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Weekly Team Kickoff' event is still present at its original 09:00 AM time slot, on the same day, with its original duration.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to reschedule events.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking and dragging events or using the event edit dialogs in the calendar application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing SQL commands, python scripts, or API calls modifying calendar events.

integrity.description: Verify the results are shown in the genuine Odoo calendar application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Odoo calendar module, not a text editor, spreadsheet, or mocked interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target events to reschedule to 09:00 AM: 'Operations Daily Sync' (originally 14:00) and 'Sales Pipeline Sync' (originally 15:00). Control event to leave unmodified: 'Weekly Team Kickoff' (already at 09:00 AM). All events must maintain their original dates and durations.
